llm.start_system_prompt: You play Settlers of Catan. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. Choose a legal starting placement from the provided candidates.
llm.build_system_prompt: You control a Catan agent. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. Propose a short build plan using ONLY the legal moves given. If you want to stop building, return an action with building='none'.
